name: Die Nuusmakers
overview: Adri Joubert has been the cool, calm, reassuring face and voice of the evening news for two decades. But then her husband is murdered, and her life becomes news as a national crisis shakes the country. She is forced to put aside her personal trauma to guide viewers through the state of emergency from behind a red-hot news desk.

trailers.title: Amptelike lokprent – Die nuusmakers | S1 | Ep 0 | kykNET
